reviews.comment:
La carga de combustibles es realmente muy lenta. Tiene un sector de mesas amplio en el Full pero no cuenta con amplia variedad de platos para almuerzo y cena como tienen la mayoria de los Full. La limpieza de los baños suele ser buena. La atencion en general es regular excepto un chico del Full que brinda muy buena atencion.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling is incredibly slow. The Full service station has a large seating area, but it doesn't offer a wide variety of lunch and dinner options like most Full service stations do. The restrooms are generally clean. The service is generally average, except for one employee who provides excellent service.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su opinión Silvina lo tendremos en cuenta

reviews.comment:
Pesima atención por parte de empleados. No se cumplen protocolos de COVID. Intenta implementar solo limite de personal. No cumple con normas de sanidad completas en el shop. La verdad que al ser un punto que los turistas deveriamos recomendar. Realmente NO lo recomiendo. Eviten por que hay estaciones a pocos kilometros y que brindan un excelente servicio a sus clientes. Dia de visita 23 de enero de 2021 hora 17:54

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from employees. COVID protocols are not being followed. They only seem to be trying to implement staff limits. They don't comply with complete sanitation standards in the shop. Honestly, given that this is a place tourists should recommend, I really DO NOT recommend it. Avoid it because there are stations a few kilometers away that provide excellent service to their customers. Visited January 23, 2021, at 5:54 PM
